theme_and_archetype.core_emotion: Technical Mastery, Trust, and High-End Professionalism
theme_and_archetype.design_philosophy: A digital 'business card' that impresses technically while remaining highly accessible to SMB owners. Deep navy backgrounds mixed with vivid mint accents to evoke a cyber-organic, precise, and modern feel. Asymmetrical bento grids, glassmorphism headers, and generous negative space.

primary.description: Deep Navy. Used for main backgrounds and large sections.

secondary.description: Darker Navy. Used for alternating sections and card backgrounds to create depth.

accent.description: Vibrant Mint Green. Used for primary CTAs, links, active states, and code highlights.

rules.h1: font-sora text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white leading-tight
rules.h2: font-sora text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white
rules.overline: font-mono text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#2ECC96]

grids.services: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 md:gap-8

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-[#2ECC96] text-[#0F1322] font-semibold font-manrope px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(46,204,150,0.4)] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-transparent border-2 border-[#2ECC96] text-[#2ECC96] font-semibold font-manrope px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#2ECC96]/10 transition-all duration-300

cards.base: p-8 rounded-2xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:border-[#2ECC96]/50 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-[#2ECC96]/10 transition-all duration-300 group

inputs.base: w-full bg-[#0F1322] border border-white/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-[#2ECC96] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2ECC96] transition-all

motion_and_interactions.hero_parallax: Subtle Y-axis translation tied to scroll progress using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.floating_elements: Continuous slow Y-axis oscillation (e.g., y: [0, -20, 0]) for code snippets and abstract visuals in the hero section.
motion_and_interactions.counters: Use Framer Motion 'useInView' to trigger count-up animations for statistics in 'Quem Somos' section.
motion_and_interactions.whatsapp_pulse: Continuous ping/pulse animation on the fixed bottom-right WhatsApp button.

media.icons: lucide-react for UI icons, highly recommend using simple and sleek stroked icons.

hero_abstract.description: Abstract blue/mint glowing dots forming wave patterns, used as subtle background texture.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a highly interactive single-page application using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Content must be exclusively in Brazilian Portuguese.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, accordions) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case. Example: `data-testid="hero-whatsapp-button"`.

sections.header: Sticky glassmorphism header (`backdrop-blur-xl`). Logo is '< >' in Navy (or white for contrast) with Mint dots, text 'Scriptool' in bold sans-serif. Smooth scrolling links to anchors.
sections.hero: Headline 'Sua empresa merece existir online'. Use the hero_abstract image blended heavily into the background (`bg-black/60` overlay). On the right side, implement a floating code snippet box using JetBrains Mono font, animated with framer-motion.
sections.quem_somos: Mission statement alongside 3 animated statistics (e.g., 'Projetos Entregues', 'Anos de Experiência') using count-up effect on scroll.
sections.servicos: Bento grid with 6 cards. Hover effect should gently lift the card and highlight the border in mint green. Add a distinct Lucide icon for each service.
sections.como_funciona: A vertical or horizontal stepper/timeline animation. Each step highlights sequentially on scroll (Briefing -> Design -> Desenvolvimento -> Entrega -> Suporte).
sections.portfolio: Grid of mockups. Use images provided in `media`. Include a simple client-side filter (e.g., 'Todos', 'Institucional', 'E-commerce'). Overlay mint tint with zoom effect on image hover.
sections.depoimentos: A sleek carousel or horizontal scroll area containing user testimonials. Use the portraits provided.
sections.planos: 3 pricing tiers. Highlight the middle tier ('Profissional') with a mint border and a 'Mais Popular' badge. Buttons link to WhatsApp with pre-filled messages.
sections.faq: Use an accordion component for FAQ. Clean, minimal borders.
sections.footer_and_fab: Dark footer with copyright and links. Floating WhatsApp button on bottom right MUST pulse continuously and link to 'https://wa.me/5541987869936'.

instructions_to_main_agent.font_setup: Import Sora, Manrope, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in the main index.css or index.html.
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Do not rely solely on color for active states.
